section_title: Restrictions on commencing etc. of suit after winding up order.--Where an order has been made for winding up
content:
375. Restrictions on commencing etc. of suit after winding up order.--Where an order has been made for winding up
of a company under this Part, no suit or other legal proceedings shall bee proceeded with or commenced against except by
leave of the Court , and subject OT such terms as the Court may impose.
